name: guard-dog
description_fr: L’Attaque du Pokémon augmente s’il subit l’effet du\ntalent Intimidation. Les capacités ou objets qui font\nchanger de Pokémon n’ont aucun effet sur lui.
description_en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.
